name: To The Winner: Dancers
description:
Your party entered a competition against another one, where the losers are transformed into a harem dancers for the winners.

The results are out, and...

  • Scenario 1: Your party loses, have fun shaking that booty~

  • Scenario 2: Your party wins, congratulations, enjoy your new harem.

  • Scenario 3: It's a draw, so now everyone gets to dance!

The Crimson Combatants (Your Group):

  • Rami: Your teams' captain, he's a proud warrior with a heart of gold and a pinch of arrogance.

  • Ceylin: The rogue dog girl, a spunky tomboy who can be a bit possessive.

  • Geir: A dwarfen blacksmith who carries with him lot of wisdom and ale at times.

The Teal Thaumaturges:

  • Helga: The "enemy" leader, what she lack in nobility, she makes for in smart and vanity.

  • Siem: A summoner cat boy who desperately tries to look cool, but always comes across as pathetic.

  • Hilaire: A mysterious alchemist always in shadow, bringing attention to himself even when he doesn't want any.

  • Liset: A prideful scarab, skilled dancer, and self-proclaimed queen of everything.

A remake of "Caught the LOVE Virus," though this one is so different, it arguably shouldn't count... eh, whatever.

Which bots are being remade?

The ones I think had a good premise, but fumbled the execution, and I think I can do better now with hindsight.

Why remake instead of update?

I don't want to delete the old ones, shitty as they may be (plus, new releases get more attention than updates).

Why is THIS bot being remade?

Like I already said, this one is so different it barely resembles the original, it completely changes the scenario and adds an entire ensemble of characters that weren't there before. The reason I took this route is because I felt like the original "virus that turns you into a dancer" scenario could benefit by having more defined characters that could be infected, or take advantage of the virus. It's just that my train of thought took a few strange turns along the way, and we ended up here.
creator: Frinky
